summary: Tested merged Metatron/Seraph unified agent and MITRE ATT&CK threat hunting integration. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend ThreatHuntingPage fully functional with stats, tabs, rules list, matches display, and ATT&CK matrix coverage.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - minor recharts sizing issue during initial render (known issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: POST /api/unified/agents/register - Agent registration success (Linux platform)
POST /api/unified/agents/register - Re-registration updates existing agent
POST /api/unified/agents/register - Windows platform agent registration
POST /api/unified/agents/{agent_id}/heartbeat - Heartbeat success with telemetry
POST /api/unified/agents/{agent_id}/heartbeat - Heartbeat with alerts
POST /api/unified/agents/{agent_id}/heartbeat - Returns 404 for unregistered agent
GET /api/hunting/status - Returns operational status with 20 rules, 8 tactics, 20 techniques
GET /api/hunting/rules - Returns all 20 hunting rules with MITRE technique/tactic mapping
GET /api/hunting/rules?tactic=TA0006 - Filters rules by Credential Access tactic
GET /api/hunting/rules?technique=T1003.001 - Filters rules by LSASS Memory Credential Dumping
POST /api/hunting/hunt - Detects mimikatz process (T1003.001 Credential Dumping)
POST /api/hunting/hunt - Detects encoded PowerShell (T1059.001 Command and Scripting)
POST /api/hunting/hunt - Detects suspicious port connections (T1095 Non-Application Layer Protocol)
POST /api/hunting/hunt - No matches for clean/normal telemetry
GET /api/hunting/tactics - Returns 8 tactics with technique coverage
GET /api/hunting/techniques - Returns 20 technique mappings
GET /api/hunting/matches - Returns recent matches
GET /api/hunting/matches/high-severity - Returns critical/high severity matches only
Frontend ThreatHuntingPage loads with correct title 'MITRE ATT&CK Threat Hunting'
Frontend 5 stat cards display: Rules Loaded (20), Hunts Executed (5), Matches Found (6), Tactics Covered (8), Techniques (20)
Frontend tabs functional: Overview, Hunting Rules, Matches, ATT&CK Matrix
Frontend Hunting Rules tab shows 20 expandable rules with toggle switches
Frontend ATT&CK Matrix shows 8 tactics with techniques: Credential Access, Execution, Persistence, Defense Evasion, Lateral Movement, Command and Control, Exfiltration, Discovery
Frontend navigation: Threat Hunting sidebar link works correctly

unified_agent_register.note: Supports Linux, Windows, macOS, Android, iOS platforms with VNS/SIEM/AI capabilities

unified_agent_heartbeat.note: Accepts telemetry data, alerts, returns queued commands

seed_data_creation: Created test unified agents (Linux, Windows platforms) and executed threat hunting with mimikatz/PowerShell telemetry during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Agent and Threat Hunting features fully working: 1) Agent registration supports all platforms (windows/linux/macos/android/ios) with capabilities like process/network/wifi_scan/siem. 2) Heartbeat endpoint accepts telemetry and triggers automatic threat hunting. 3) Threat hunting engine has 20 rules covering 8 MITRE ATT&CK tactics. 4) Detections verified: mimikatz (T1003.001), encoded PowerShell (T1059.001), suspicious ports (T1095). 5) Frontend ThreatHuntingPage works with all tabs - Overview shows critical matches and tactics coverage, Rules tab shows 20 rules with toggles, Matrix tab shows 8 tactics.
